articles.description: Summary: MATIC’s price has gone up by 33% in the last month. Since Polygon announced that Meta had selected them for minting digital collectibles, MATIC has seen a surge in on-chain activity. A price/network growth divergence, usually followed by a price retracement, might be underway.
